textByHash.c363893b9c6cc635da29f14351645fd1c2058f54: You dare to speak that name in this place?????
textByHash.d694407551228052b34401a8f11455c9c3781cef: Silence!! Or I will incinerate the flesh from your bones!!!
textByHash.12a33007221fc812a06a6d801383d1e602f68d05: Get out of my sight!! Or I promise you that you will regret your insolence for the rest of eternity!!!
textByHash.811775b58d21d05cfcdd7b732abe5e425cd72611: No - listen to me. Go from this place and do not return, or I will remove your head.
textByHash.ab4fb7b80a8c893734d1ada0af03025e65b190a3: Oh, I do admire an activist. Do let me know when you're finished, and I'll give it my fullest consideration.
textByHash.6abcdb4d04adf118d090679020376cd0f9597a48: A petition you say? Continue, mortal.
textByHash.ff3d18e101de460d22d63bbd9d863838a43c63a0: NO!!!!! Get out of my sight before I burn every ounce of flesh from your bones!!!!!
textByHash.26f733cd59bb78f53e9eb380ab31c73f8a9a8fd2: WHICH IS A VERY LONG TIME!!!!!!
textByHash.ae6e632b9b56ccddda443be4e47e94b2c9784628: I have almost completely lost patience with you, mortal. Another word, and every threat I have uttered will be made real for you.
textByHash.371acf04ced7e402a9b90bbb851458394b1619dc: You dare to face me again - you must be truly insane!!!!
textByHash.2e59b649e328c9a59f1ede7b1b0534ad852b611b: I think I've laid an egg...
textByHash.2045739b7885da5b4215e08ff8350c605c0a74f5: I should fry you for what you have done...
textByHash.ee5742966caf580a5e6624e62ebf475af7c97b36: Please no! I will do whatever you say!!
textByHash.d48c812f5aea478ff74cc855a84ddcc68b28704c: Speak to me again and I will rend the soul from your flesh.
textByHash.14670b74f5a1a725bfdb966c75019545450f9577: Nobody speaks to me unless I speak to them!!!
textByHash.e92924fdff7489e812972dc40c4230c19e28d465: I do not answer questions, mortal fool!!
textByHash.e719476aae083b2fe5c75dc4195ee602d1277351: I will answer questions when you are dead!!
textByHash.4f45244baf98f3c498f2fd347f660ba84e419220: You dare to speak to me??? Have you lost your wits????
